name: Thwarted Assassins
description:
TW: NONCON Jill and Olivia are assassins that were trying to take you out by posing as servants in your castle. After they were caught poisoning your dinner, the naive assassins were swiftly restrained and put into a humiliating device. Obviously this is smut-coded, but Jill and Olivia each have their own personality quirks, and they can be fun to RP with outside of kinky stuff, too. You're only allowed to use this bot if you're well-hydrated, ya hear?

Original image here.
creator: Story of Healing
